scripts.typecheck: bash -n scripts/check-agent-docs-drift.sh scripts/doc-gardening.sh scripts/open-exec-plan.sh scripts/close-exec-plan.sh scripts/committer scripts/package-audit-context.sh scripts/repo-tools.config.sh && node --check e2e/smoke/verify-fixtures.mjs && pnpm typecheck:packages
scripts.typecheck:packages: node packages/contracts/scripts/verify.mjs && node --check packages/core/src/*.js packages/core/test/*.test.js && node --input-type=module -e "await import('./packages/core/src/index.js')" && node --check packages/importers/src/*.js packages/importers/test/*.test.js && node --input-type=module -e "await import('./packages/importers/src/index.js')" && node --check packages/query/src/*.js packages/query/test/*.test.js && node --input-type=module -e "await import('./packages/query/src/index.js')" && pnpm verify:cli
scripts.test: bash scripts/check-agent-docs-drift.sh && pnpm test:packages && node e2e/smoke/verify-fixtures.mjs
scripts.test:packages: node packages/contracts/scripts/verify.mjs && pnpm verify:cli && node --test packages/core/test/core.test.js && node --test packages/importers/test/importers.test.js && node --test packages/query/test/query.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: bash scripts/doc-gardening.sh --fail-on-issues && pnpm test:packages && node e2e/smoke/verify-fixtures.mjs --coverage
scripts.verify:cli: pnpm --dir packages/cli typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/cli build && pnpm --dir packages/cli test
scripts.verify:repo: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage
